profile_summary.subtitle: Senior AI & Software Engineer
profile_summary.summary: This is a concise snapshot of my profile: backend, AI, production systems, performance, scalability, and engineering reliability.

exceptional_work.label: About Me in Brief
exceptional_work.text: For 15+ years I have been building AI-driven products and backend systems for real businesses: from architecture and API design to production deployment, performance tuning, and operations under load. Key work includes an AI financial assistant that scaled to 1M+ users, backend systems in Python/FastAPI/PostgreSQL/AWS, NLP/ML modules for intent handling and forecasting, and continuous refinement of AI-generated code: fixing logic issues, removing hallucinated APIs, hardening reliability, and improving latency.

neira.description: Leading engineering team with focus on code quality and engineering excellence. Conducting comprehensive code reviews, ensuring adherence to industry standards for efficiency, scalability, and reliability. Curating AI-generated code examples and validating team's code output. Implementing rigorous testing frameworks, performance profiling, and debugging workflows. Establishing best practices and mentoring engineers in production-grade development.

aisales.description: Led engineering team building scalable AI financial assistant serving 1M+ users with 99.9% uptime. Conducted daily code reviews ensuring code quality standards and best practices. Implemented comprehensive testing frameworks (pytest, integration tests), performance monitoring, and debugging workflows. Mentored team in Python/FastAPI optimization achieving 70% latency reduction through profiling and code review feedback. Established code quality standards, security best practices, and containerization with Docker. Supervised NLP/ML pipeline development with rigorous evaluation metrics, improving accuracy by 25-40%.

aisales.title: AIDA Finance Bot
aisales.subtitle: AI Financial Assistant - Production-Grade Quality Standards
aisales.challenge: Build a scalable conversational AI platform capable of handling 1M+ users with enterprise-level quality, performance, and reliability standards.
aisales.solution: Architected production backend using Python/FastAPI/PostgreSQL/AWS with focus on code quality and engineering excellence. Implemented comprehensive testing frameworks (pytest, integration tests), performance profiling tools, and debugging workflows. Established code review processes, security best practices, and Docker containerization. Developed NLP/ML pipelines with rigorous evaluation metrics.
results: Achieved peak revenue of $77K/month via AdSense
Reduced response time by 70% through DB optimization

callprofit.title: CallProfit CRM
callprofit.subtitle: Enterprise CRM with Quality Standards
callprofit.challenge: Build scalable IT infrastructure for call center operations with focus on reliability, performance, and code quality standards.
callprofit.solution: Implemented enterprise-grade Bitrix24 CRM with custom modules following best practices. Developed robust REST API integrations with comprehensive error handling and monitoring. Built automation workflows with testing coverage. Created analytics dashboards (Google DataStudio) with performance optimization. Established code quality standards and led team of 5+ engineers.

neira.title: NEiRA AI Platform
neira.subtitle: Multi-Agent AI with Code Quality Focus
neira.challenge: Create an AI agent platform with production-grade code quality, comprehensive testing, and reliable execution for enterprise automation.
neira.solution: Architected multi-agent system using Python/FastAPI with emphasis on engineering excellence. Curated AI-generated code examples, ensuring adherence to industry standards for efficiency, scalability, and reliability. Implemented rigorous testing frameworks, performance monitoring, and debugging workflows. Led code reviews and established best practices for production-grade AI systems. Integrated LLM APIs (OpenAI, LangChain) with quality validation.
results: Automated sales reducing manual work by 60%
